properties.remark: ELEV 3745 FT CWOP
SEVERAL TREES DOWN NEAR SUNLAND PARK MALL. TIME ESTIMATED BASED ON NEARBY GUST REPORT.
MINOR FLOODING IN LOW-LYING NEIGHBORHOOD. WATER DEPTH 1 TO 1.5 FEET IN STREETS NEAR CALLE DIAZ AND CALLE MOROCCO.

RUSHING WATER CAUSED A ROCK WALL TO COLLAPSE JUST EAST OF SUNCREST DRIVE NORTH OF WALLENBERG. SWIFT WATER RUSHED DOWN SOUTH MESA HILLS DRIVE NEARBY, BUT ONLY A FEW INCHES DEEP. FLOODING LIKELY EXACERBATED BY EXTREME RAINFALL RATES.
HOMES FLOODED IN LOW-LYING PORTION OF BUENA VISTA NEIGHBORHOOD INCLUDING COURCHESNE ROAD. DRAINAGE MAY HAVE BEEN COMPROMISED BY NEARBY CONSTRUCTION. TIME ESTIMATED BASED ON RAINFALL REPORTS.
FLOODING OF I-10 ACCESS ROADS AT GATEWAY WEST AND GERONIMO IN CENTRAL EL PASO, TX
ELEV 6841 FT CWOP
66 MPH CONVECTIVE WIND GUST REPORTED BY OFF DUTY NWS EMPLOYEE OVER NE EL PASO.
SPOTTER ON TWITTER REPORTS 60 MPH WIND GUST WITH 55 MPH SUSTAINED. NEAR ZERO VISIBLITY DUE TO BLOWING DUST.
PUBLIC REPORT VIA FACEBOOK STATE THAT REDROCK RECEIVED AROUND 3.5 INCHES OF RAIN AND THAT SOME ROADS WERE IMPASSALBE.
THUNDERSTORM WIND GUST AT THE EL PASO INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT, KELP.
HEAVY RAIN FROM STATIONARY STORMS FORCED CLOSURE OF W-BOUND LANES OF HWY 26 FROM MM26-27 DUE TO FLOODING. RADAR ESTIMATES 3.5-3.7 INCHES OF RAINFALL.
SOME WATER CROSSED HIGHWAY 70 AND CAUSED ROAD TO BE CLOSED. THERE WAS ALSO A WASHOUT IN SOLDIER CANYON WHERE FIRE PREVIOUSLY OCCURRED. RADAR ESTIMATES RAINFALL OF AROUND 0.60.
I-10 AT MILE POST 36, EAST OF LORDSBURG, WATER IS RUNNING ACROSS INTERSTATE ALONG DIPS AND WITH BEBRIS DUE TO RAIN AND FLOODING.
WET MICROBURST WIND.
ALSO HALF INCH OF RAIN IN 20 MINUTES
THE FIRE DEPT. IS CLEARING OFF 6 INCHES OF MUD AND DEBRIS FROM THE ROADS. SCENIC AND N. FLORIDA AVE ARE THE CROSS STREETS THAT THE DEBRIS WAS.
2 FT OF WATER WITH DEBRIS COVERING ROADWAYS NEAR INTERSECTION OF LONGHORN AND SHORTHORN DRIVES. WATER ENTERING RESIDENCE NEAR THIS INTERSECTION.
APPARENT MICROBURST AT DELL CITY WEST TEXAS MESONET SITE.
WIND BLEW ROOF OFF OF A BUILDING.
